product_overview: JobHub helps Australian job seekers diagnose why applications fail, generate targeted application documents (resumes, cover letters, selection criteria), and manage their job pipeline with an evidence-backed achievement bank and match engine.
core_goals: Diagnose a candidate's positioning and return a clear, sectioned action plan after a mandatory onboarding intake
Match a pasted job description to the candidate profile and surface ranked achievement suggestions and a match score
Generate tailored application documents (resume, cover letter, selection criteria, STAR responses) using selected achievements and allow inline edits
Store, preview, export, and manage generated documents in a document library
Track job applications through a pipeline with status transitions, deadlines, and AI-generated outreach emails
Manage a reusable profile bank of achievements, experience, education and regenerate AI-derived identity cards that drive generation framing

features.name: Authentication (email/password)
features.description: Create an account or sign in with an email and password to unlock the dashboard and saved profile data.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard
Navigate to /auth -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit sign-up form -> See onboarding intake if first-time

features.name: Onboarding Intake
features.description: A required multi-step intake that collects job targets, job search history, perceived blockers and uploads application documents to generate a personalized diagnostic report.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See onboarding welcome -> Proceed to role and location step -> Provide target role, target city, seniority and industry -> Submit step to advance
Provide search timeline and channels -> Provide applications count and select channels used -> Submit step to advance
Provide response pattern and describe perceived blocker -> Submit step to advance

Upload resume (required) and optionally upload cover letters -> Submit intake -> See full-screen processing screen while the system builds the diagnosis -> See diagnostic report displayed on the dashboard
Navigate to / -> Complete steps 1–4 -> Attempt to submit without a resume -> See validation error about required resume -> Upload resume -> Submit intake -> See processing screen

features.name: Processing Screen (Onboarding)
features.description: A full-screen animated processing experience that polls the backend while the diagnostic report is generated and offers a retry path if the generation fails.
user_flows: Submit onboarding intake -> See processing screen with rotating status messages and countdown bar -> Wait until report status is COMPLETE -> Processing view finishes and proceeds to report display
Submit onboarding intake -> See processing screen -> If user sees a retry option after a validation-triggered restart, choose to retry -> Processing resumes

features.name: Diagnostic Report
features.description: An AI-generated, sectioned diagnosis of targeting, document audit, pipeline issues and a ranked 3-step action plan with inline per‑section relevance feedback.
user_flows: See diagnostic report panel on / after onboarding completes -> Expand and collapse the Targeting Assessment section -> Read problem and fix pairs in the section -> Rate the section relevance as Spot on / Partially / Missed the mark
See diagnostic report panel on / -> Scroll through the Report Islands sequentially -> After the what_jobhub_does island, proceed to the dashboard to start applying
Navigate to / -> Open the saved Diagnosis overlay from dashboard summary -> Re-read sections and update any per-section relevance feedback

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Home overview showing application pipeline counts by status, upcoming deadlines, achievement summary and the match engine for quick JD analysis.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See application counts grouped by status (SAVED, APPLIED, INTERVIEW, OFFER, REJECTED)
Navigate to / -> See upcoming deadlines list for applications closing within 7 days -> Click a deadline item to view related application details in the tracker
Navigate to / -> Paste a job description into the match engine area -> Submit analysis -> See overall match score and ranked achievements

features.name: Match Engine
features.description: Semantic analysis of a pasted job description against the user's profile producing a match score, ranked achievement matches, extracted metadata and Australian-specific flags.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Paste a job description into the match engine input -> Submit analysis -> See overall match score percentage and ranked achievements labelled STRONG, MODERATE, or WEAK
Navigate to / -> After analysis, save the matched job to the tracker -> Navigate to /tracker to confirm job appears in the application list
Navigate to / -> After analysis, open the matched job in the application workspace -> Navigate to /application-workspace -> See the matched job preloaded

features.name: Application Workspace (Document generation & tools)
features.description: A full workspace for a matched job where users select achievements, generate tailored resumes, cover letters and STAR responses, edit outputs inline, run quality checks and export final files.
user_flows: Navigate to /application-workspace -> Select achievements to include from the achievement selector -> Generate Resume -> Edit generated content inline -> Preview the rendered document -> Export document as DOCX
Navigate to /application-workspace -> Generate Cover Letter -> Run Cover Letter Personalisation check -> Adjust tone via Tone Rewrite -> Save document to library
Navigate to /application-workspace -> Generate Selection Criteria (STAR responses) -> Edit responses inline -> Copy document content to clipboard -> Save to library

features.name: Document Export & Feedback
features.description: Export generated documents as PDF or DOCX and provide post-generation feedback (1–5 stars, weakest section, free text) to improve output quality over time.
user_flows: Generate a document in /application-workspace -> Preview generated content -> Download as PDF -> Confirm file saved locally

Generate a document in /application-workspace -> Rate the output with 1–5 stars -> Optionally select which section was weakest and enter a short comment -> Submit feedback -> See confirmation that feedback was saved

features.name: Application Tracker
features.description: Centralized tracker for all job applications with filters, sorting, kanban-style status transitions, deadline tracking and AI email generation for follow-ups and outreach.
user_flows: Navigate to /tracker -> View applications in card layout -> Filter by status (ALL, SAVED, APPLIED, INTERVIEW, OFFER, REJECTED) -> Sort by match score
Navigate to /tracker -> Open a job card -> Advance application status by activating the status control -> See the job move to the next pipeline stage and pipeline funnel update
Navigate to /tracker -> Set closing date for a job -> See the job appear in upcoming deadlines list -> Generate a follow-up email draft for the job -> Copy the generated email

features.name: Profile Bank
features.description: A repository to view and edit professional summary, work experience, achievements, education and certifications, with AI polishing and identity card regeneration.
user_flows: Navigate to /workspace -> View professional summary and profile completion percentage -> Edit summary and save changes
Navigate to /workspace -> Add a new achievement with title, description and metrics -> Link the achievement to an experience entry -> Use AI to polish the achievement wording
Navigate to /workspace -> Import a resume to backfill profile data -> See extracted fields added to the profile and updated achievement suggestions
Navigate to /workspace -> Regenerate Identity Card -> See new AI-derived identity cards appear in the profile

features.name: Document Library
features.description: Library of all generated documents grouped by recency where users can preview, copy content, download a DOCX and delete documents.
user_flows: Navigate to /documents -> See documents grouped by date (Today, Yesterday, This Week, This Month, Older)
Navigate to /documents -> Filter documents by type (Resume, Cover Letter, Selection Criteria) -> Search by title
Navigate to /documents -> Open a document preview in markdown -> Copy document content to clipboard -> Download document as DOCX -> Delete document with confirmation

features.name: Email Templates Library
features.description: A static, organized library of pre-built email templates for outreach, follow-ups, interviews and networking, with tips for personalization.
user_flows: Navigate to /email-templates -> Browse templates grouped by category (Outreach, Follow-Up, Interview, Networking)
Navigate to /email-templates -> Expand a template card to view the full email text and personalization tips -> Copy template to clipboard

tech_stack.ui_library: Tailwind CSS 4.2.1, Framer Motion 12.35.2, Lucide React icons, Sonner 2.0.7 (toasts)

tech_stack.other: React Router DOM 7.13.1, TanStack React Query 5.90.21, Supabase 2.99.1, Axios 1.13.6, @react-pdf/renderer 4.3.2, docx 9.6.1, file-saver 2.0.5, react-markdown 10.1.0, @sentry/react 10.45.0

routes.description: Login and sign-up page supporting magic link OTP and password authentication via Supabase
Home dashboard with application pipeline stats, match engine, upcoming deadlines, and achievement summary
Job application tracker with status management, notes, pipeline funnel, and email generation
Full workspace for generating and managing job application documents (resume, cover letter, selection criteria)
Profile management hub for achievements, experience, education, certifications, and identity card
Library of all generated documents grouped by date with preview, copy, download, and delete
Static library of pre-built email templates for job search outreach, follow-ups, and networking
Catch-all fallback redirecting unmatched routes to the dashboard

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Multi-mode auth via Supabase supporting magic link OTP and email/password login; new users get anonymous sessions with onboarding gate
user_interactions: Enter email address in the input field
Toggle between Magic Link and Password authentication modes
Click Send Magic Link to receive OTP email
Enter OTP code to verify and log in
Enter password and click Sign In for password mode
Click Sign Up to create a new account with email and password
See error message on invalid credentials or expired OTP

features.name: Onboarding Intake
features.description: 4-step profile intake form collecting target role, job search history, and profile data; triggers AI processing and diagnosis report generation
user_interactions: Complete step 1 - enter target role, city, seniority level, and industry
Complete step 2 - enter job search duration, channels used, and response patterns
Complete step 3 - enter name, phone, LinkedIn URL, and location
Optionally upload resume for auto-extraction of profile data
Click Next to advance through steps
See processing screen while AI generates profile and diagnosis report
Click Retry if processing fails

features.name: Diagnosis Report
features.description: AI-generated diagnosis report showing targeting, document audit, pipeline analysis, root cause analysis, and ranked action plan
user_interactions: View report sections (Targeting, Document Audit, Pipeline Analysis, Root Cause, Action Plan)
Expand and collapse individual report sections
Rate section relevance with thumbs up or thumbs down
Read problem and fix pairs in each section
Click Proceed to go to the dashboard

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Home overview showing application pipeline counts by status, upcoming deadlines in next 7 days, match engine, and achievement summary
user_interactions: View application counts by status (SAVED, APPLIED, INTERVIEW, OFFER, REJECTED)
View upcoming deadlines list for applications closing within 7 days
Click on status cards to navigate to filtered tracker view
View achievement count and click to manage achievements
Access match engine to paste job descriptions

features.name: Match Engine
features.description: Semantic matching of job descriptions against candidate profile producing a match score, ranked achievements, extracted metadata, and Australian-specific flags
user_interactions: Paste a job description into the text area
Optionally enter a job URL to auto-fetch the description
Click Analyse to run matching
View overall match score percentage
View ranked achievements labelled STRONG, MODERATE, or WEAK
View extracted company name, role title, and metadata
View Australian flags (APS level, citizenship, security clearance, salary type)
See warning modal if match score is below 40%
Click Save to Tracker to add job to application tracker
Click Open Workspace to go to the application workspace

features.name: Application Workspace
features.description: Full document generation workspace for a matched job with tabs for resume, cover letter, selection criteria, and interview prep plus embedded analysis panels
user_interactions: Select achievements to include from the achievement selector
Click Generate Resume to create a tailored resume
Click Generate Cover Letter to create a cover letter
Click Generate Selection Criteria to create STAR responses
Edit generated document content inline
Preview rendered document
Export document as DOCX or PDF
Copy document content to clipboard
Save document to library
Run Resume Scorecard to get quality score and dimension breakdown
Run ATS Coverage check to see matched and missing keywords
Run Cover Letter Personalization check for tailoring score
Run Tone Rewrite to adjust document tone (Confident, Concise, Formal, Warm, Technical)
Run Gap Analysis to see skill gaps and quick wins
Generate Interview Questions with practice mode
View Salary Insights for role and location
View Company Research including hiring manager details
View JD Summary bar for key requirements
View 10-Dimension scoring (grade A-F per dimension)
View Australian flags for APS level, citizenship, clearance, salary type

features.name: Application Tracker
features.description: Centralized tracker for all job applications with kanban-style status management, notes, pipeline funnel visualization, and AI email generation
user_interactions: View all applications in card layout
Filter by status (ALL, SAVED, APPLIED, INTERVIEW, OFFER, REJECTED)
Filter by grade (A/B, C, D/F)
Sort by match score, company, date applied, closing date, or priority
Click status badge to advance application through the pipeline
Add or edit notes in markdown format
Set job priority (DREAM, TARGET, BACKUP)
Set closing date for deadline tracking
Click Generate Follow-Up Email to create an email draft
Click Generate Cold Outreach to create outreach email
Click Generate Rejection Response to respond to rejections
Click Generate Offer Negotiation to negotiate salary
Click Parse Notes to extract action items from notes
Click Delete to remove application with confirmation
View pipeline funnel showing application counts per stage
View upcoming deadlines highlighted in the sidebar

features.name: Profile Bank
features.description: Central repository for managing candidate profile data including achievements, experience, education, certifications, skills, summary, and identity card
user_interactions: View and edit professional summary with coaching hints
View and edit skills (technical, industry knowledge, soft skills)
Add or edit work experience entries with dates and descriptions
Link achievements to specific experience entries
Add or edit education entries
Add or edit certifications and volunteering entries
Add new achievement with title, description, and metrics
Edit existing achievement inline
Polish achievement wording via AI
Delete achievement with confirmation
View profile completion percentage and missing fields indicator
Click Regenerate Identity Card to refresh the AI-generated profile summary
Import resume via resume importer modal to backfill profile data

features.name: Document Library
features.description: Library of all AI-generated documents (resumes, cover letters, selection criteria) grouped by recency with preview, copy, export, and delete
user_interactions: View documents grouped by date (Today, Yesterday, This Week, This Month, Older)
Filter documents by type (Resume, Cover Letter, Selection Criteria)
Search documents by title
Click a document to preview its content in markdown
Copy document content to clipboard
Download document as DOCX file
Delete document with confirmation

features.name: Email Templates Library
features.description: Static library of pre-built email templates for job search scenarios organized by category
user_interactions: Browse templates grouped by category (Outreach, Follow-Up, Interview, Networking)
Expand a template card to view the full email template
Copy template to clipboard
Read personalization tips for each template

known_limitations.issue: Email Templates Library is entirely static with no backend storage or personalization
known_limitations.impact: Templates cannot be saved, edited, or personalized per user

known_limitations.issue: Theme and hue picker settings are stored in localStorage only, not synced to backend
known_limitations.impact: Colour preferences reset if localStorage is cleared or on a different device

known_limitations.issue: Interview practice mode is UI-only with no backend tracking of practice sessions
known_limitations.impact: Practice history and progress are not persisted

known_limitations.issue: Achievement backfill only auto-triggers when achievement count is zero; no automatic re-trigger
known_limitations.impact: Users must manually initiate re-extraction after adding new resume content

known_limitations.issue: Profile claim on returning magic-link login depends on backend matching by email
known_limitations.impact: If email match fails, returning users may lose access to their previous profile data

known_limitations.issue: Report re-display requires manually clearing the seen flag; report does not re-show on return visits
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot easily re-read their diagnosis report after dismissing it
